member.name: T:LJCDocDataDAL5.LJCGenDocConfig5
member.summary: Represents a GenCodeDoc configuration.

member.summary: Initializes an object instance.

member.name: M:LJCDocDataDAL5.LJCGenDocConfig5.GetParentPathPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the relative path prefix.
member.returns: The relative path prefix from the program folder.

member.name: M:LJCDocDataDAL5.LJCGenDocConfig5.SetProperty(System.String)
member.summary: Sets a configuration property from a template line.
member.returns: true if line is a file; otherwise false.

member.summary: The DocDataXML target path.

member.summary: The GenDataXML target path.

member.summary: The Output target path.

member.name: P:LJCDocDataDAL5.LJCGenDocConfig5.WriteDocDataXML
member.summary: Indicates if the DocDataXML will be written to a file.

member.summary: Indicates if the GenDataXML will be written to a file.
